description: 44 - 13-09-2024 - Email from Peter Mandelson (whilst at Global Counsel) to Jon
text:
Garvie (former Chief of Staff to the Foreign Secretary, FCDO)

From: Peter Mandelson
To: Third Party
ce: Jon Garvie; Third
‘Subject: Re: Invitation for CG Brian Davidson: VIP Guest Talk with Lord Peter Mandelson
Date: 13 September 2024 11:49:31

You don't often get email from Personal Learn why this is important
Jon will push the envelope out...

Sent from my iPhone

On 13 Sep 2024, at 12:21, Third Party Personal
wrote:

Third

Could you share the public top lines with me?

Thanks,

Third
Pt

From: Peter MandelsonPersonal

Sent: 12 September 2024 21:45

Personal

Subject: Re: Invitation for CG Brian Davidson: VIP Guest Talk with Lord Peter
Mandelson

It has to be turned into some thing! can say! The drift is fine. it mustn’t sound
naive ie we are vigilant and have eyes wide open but we also want a serious
sustained relationship. Yes ?

From: Jon Garvie Personal
Date: Thursday, 12 September 2024 at 22:21
To: Peter Mandelson Personal

Subject: FW: Invitation for CG Brian Davidson: VIP Guest Talk with Lord
Peter Mandelson

OFFICIAL

They sent through attached which is obviously far too generic to be much
use. We can expand on call tomorrow.

Jon

145

OFFICIAL

From: JCS
Sent: Thursday, September 12, 2024 5:03 PM
To: Jon Garvie Personal ; Kate Harrisson
Personal
Ce: Dan Chugg * Personal ; Brian Davidson
Personal ; JGS
JCS
Subject: RE: Invitation for JCS : VIP Guest Talk with Lord Peter
Mandelson
Hi Jon, Kate,

Many thanks for your patience. Please see attached some high-level points/background
for Lord Mandelson ahead of your chat with him tomorrow. These are public lines
reflecting this government's position on China.

Let me know if you'd like anything else covered.
Kind regards,

JCS
Deputy Head of China Strategy Team and China Parliamentary Lead |
North East Asia and China Directorate
Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office | King Charles St | London |

SW1A 2AH | Personal
| Personal

Sent from Outlook for iOS.
OFFICIAL
From: Third Party

Sent: Thursday, September 5, 2024 5:24 PM

To: Brian Davidson Personal

Ce: Third Party

Subject: Invitation for CG Brian Davidson: VIP Guest Talk with Lord Peter
Mandelson

You don't often get email from Third Party Learn why this is
important

152


Dear Mr. Brian Davidson.
On behalf of Centre on Contemporary China and the World (CCCW) at
the University of Hong Kong (HKU) Director Li Cheng, I am delighted to
extend an exclusive invitation to you for a captivating guest talk with
Lord Peter Mandelson, where we will delve into the new era of British
foreign policy and its implications for Sino-UK relations and the global
landscape. The event will be available to the public for online viewing, but
the in-person event is invite-only.
Drawing from his extensive experience as a former European Trade
Commissioner and British First Secretary of State, Lord Mandelson will
provide invaluable insights on several key topics, including:
- Sir Keir Starmer's foreign policy
- The Labour Party's priorities in relation to China
- Strategies for businesses navigating geopolitical risks
- The role of higher education in fostering global cooperation
This event promises to be an enlightening experience, offering a unique
perspective from one of the foremost experts in the field. Your presence
would greatly enrich the discussion and add to the prestige of the
occasion.
Please find the event details below, and on the attached invitation:
Date: September 16, 2024
Time: 17:00-18:30
Location: Social Sciences Chamber, 11/F, The Jockey Club
Tower, Centennial Campus, HKU
We would be honoured to have you join us for this special event. Kindly
RSVP by Monday, September 9, to confirm your attendance. This
invitation is transferable, pending approval by CCCW.
We look forward to welcoming you.
Best,
Assistant to the Director
Centre on Contemporary China and the World (CCCW)
The University of Hong Kong
Follow us online: www.gov.uk/fcdo
Third Party
153
